howToCreateRequest: How do I create a cargo request?
howToCreateRequestAnswer: Navigate to the Create tab, fill in cargo details, set price, and submit. Carriers will then send bids for your cargo.
howToSubmitBid: How do I submit a bid?
howToSubmitBidAnswer: As a carrier, browse active cargo requests, compare offers, and submit your bid with your price and message.
howPaymentWorksAnswer: Payment uses secure escrow. Your payment is held until delivery is confirmed. Carriers receive payment only after successful delivery.
howToTrackOrder: How can I track my order?
howToTrackOrderAnswer: Once a bid is accepted, you can track the cargo in real-time using GPS. Chat directly with the carrier for updates.
whatIfCarrierLate: What if the carrier is late?
whatIfCarrierLateAnswer: Contact the carrier immediately via chat. If the issue persists, contact our support team for assistance.
canICancelOrderAnswer: You can cancel before a bid is accepted. Once accepted, cancellation requires carrier consent and may incur fees.

step1.title: Create Cargo Request
step1.description: Post your cargo with pickup, delivery, and weight details. Get quotes from verified carriers.

step2.title: Receive and Compare Bids
step2.description: Carriers submit bids. Compare prices, ratings, and choose the best one.

step3.title: Communicate and Track
step3.description: Chat directly with carrier. Track shipment in real-time with GPS.

step4.title: Secure Payment
step4.description: Payment held in escrow until delivery. Your money is safe.

step1.title: Find Cargo Requests
step1.description: Browse active cargo requests. Filter by location, type, and weight.

step2.title: Submit Bids
step2.description: Set your price and add a message. Show why you're the best choice.

step3.title: Start Transport
step3.description: Once your bid is accepted, pick up the cargo and deliver safely.

step4.title: Build Reputation
step4.description: Get positive reviews and increase your rating. Higher rating = more jobs.

privacyPolicyContent.heading: 1. Who We Are
privacyPolicyContent.body: TruckinFox AS ("we", "us") operates the TruckinFox mobile application, a marketplace connecting cargo owners with freight carriers in Norway. Contact: support@truckinfox.no

privacyPolicyContent.heading: 2. Data We Collect
privacyPolicyContent.body:
We collect information you provide: name, email, phone number, company name and organisation number (carriers), profile photo, cargo request details, cargo photos, and payment information via Vipps.

We also collect automatically: device identifiers, IP address, approximate location (with your permission), app analytics, and push notification tokens.

privacyPolicyContent.heading: 3. How We Use Your Data
privacyPolicyContent.body:
We use your data to:
• Operate and improve TruckinFox
• Match cargo owners with carriers
• Process payments and manage escrow
• Send transactional notifications
• Verify carrier businesses via Brønnøysundregistrene
• Comply with Norwegian and EU legal obligations
• Detect fraud and ensure platform safety

privacyPolicyContent.heading: 4. Legal Basis (GDPR)
privacyPolicyContent.body:
Contract performance: to fulfil the service you requested.
Legitimate interests: fraud prevention and platform security.
Consent: location access and marketing.
Legal obligation: tax records and anti-money laundering.

privacyPolicyContent.heading: 5. Data Sharing
privacyPolicyContent.body:
We share limited data with:
• Other users (name, rating, photo visible to counterparties)
• Vipps AS (payment processing)
• Supabase Inc (database/storage, EU region)
• Brønnøysundregistrene (carrier verification, read-only)

We do not sell your personal data.

privacyPolicyContent.heading: 6. Data Retention
privacyPolicyContent.body: We retain account data while your account is active. After deletion, personal data is removed within 30 days, except where legally required (e.g. accounting records for 5 years under the Norwegian Bookkeeping Act).

privacyPolicyContent.heading: 7. Your Rights
privacyPolicyContent.body:
Under GDPR you may: access, correct, or delete your data; restrict or object to processing; request data portability; and lodge a complaint with Datatilsynet (datatilsynet.no).

To delete your account use Settings → Security → Delete Account. For other requests contact support@truckinfox.no.

privacyPolicyContent.heading: 8. Security
privacyPolicyContent.body: We use TLS encryption in transit, AES-256 at rest, row-level security on all database tables, and support multi-factor authentication. Please use a strong, unique password.

privacyPolicyContent.heading: 9. Children
privacyPolicyContent.body: TruckinFox is for users aged 18 and over. We do not knowingly collect data from children under 16.

privacyPolicyContent.heading: 10. Changes
privacyPolicyContent.body: We may update this policy and will notify you of material changes via in-app notification at least 14 days before they take effect.

termsOfServiceContent.heading: 1. Acceptance
termsOfServiceContent.body: By creating an account and using TruckinFox you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the app.

termsOfServiceContent.heading: 2. The Service
termsOfServiceContent.body: TruckinFox is an online marketplace connecting cargo owners (Customers) with freight carriers (Carriers). We are not a freight carrier. The transport contract is between the Customer and Carrier; we provide the platform, escrow, and tools.

termsOfServiceContent.heading: 3. Account Registration
termsOfServiceContent.body: You must provide accurate information and be at least 18 years old. You are responsible for keeping your password confidential. One person may not hold multiple accounts.

termsOfServiceContent.heading: 4. Carrier Obligations
termsOfServiceContent.body:
Carriers must:
• Hold a valid Norwegian goods transport licence where required
• Maintain adequate cargo insurance
• Accurately describe vehicles and capacity
• Complete accepted jobs professionally and on time
• Verify their business via Brønnøysundregistrene within 30 days of first accepted bid

termsOfServiceContent.heading: 5. Customer Obligations
termsOfServiceContent.body:
Customers must:
• Provide accurate cargo descriptions, weight, and addresses
• Ensure cargo is legally permitted for transport
• Not ship prohibited or hazardous materials without carrier agreement
• Be available at agreed pickup and delivery times

termsOfServiceContent.heading: 6. Bids and Contracts
termsOfServiceContent.body: A submitted bid is a binding offer. When a Customer accepts and payment is initiated, a transport contract forms directly between the Customer and Carrier. TruckinFox is not a party to that contract.

termsOfServiceContent.heading: 7. Payments and Escrow
termsOfServiceContent.body: Payments are processed via Vipps. Funds are held in escrow until the Customer confirms delivery. TruckinFox charges a 10% platform fee on the carrier's bid. In disputes, TruckinFox may hold funds pending investigation.

termsOfServiceContent.heading: 8. Cancellations
termsOfServiceContent.body: If a Carrier cancels after accepting, escrowed funds are returned to the Customer in full. If a Customer cancels after cargo collection, the parties must agree on compensation.

termsOfServiceContent.heading: 9. Prohibited Conduct
termsOfServiceContent.body: You may not post false listings, harass other users, circumvent the platform to avoid fees, use the platform unlawfully, or attempt to reverse-engineer the app. Violations may result in immediate account suspension.

termsOfServiceContent.heading: 10. Limitation of Liability
termsOfServiceContent.body: TruckinFox is a marketplace intermediary. To the extent permitted by Norwegian law, our liability is limited to the platform fees you paid in the preceding 12 months. We are not liable for cargo damage or delays.

termsOfServiceContent.heading: 11. Governing Law
termsOfServiceContent.body: These Terms are governed by Norwegian law. Disputes shall be resolved before Oslo District Court (Oslo tingrett), unless mandatory consumer protection laws provide otherwise.

termsOfServiceContent.heading: 12. Changes
termsOfServiceContent.body: We may update these Terms and will notify you at least 14 days in advance via in-app notification. Continued use after that date constitutes acceptance.
